data.title: Nvidia stock drops as it gives disappointing current-quarter guidance, with no AI chip sales to China.
data.description: The stock of Nvidia experienced a decline on Thursday following lower-than-expected current-quarter guidance from the artificial intelligence company. This guidance notably does not account for any AI chip sales to China. The uncertainty surrounding China has had a negative impact on Nvidia's stock performance. Investors are now contemplating the next steps for the AI chipmaker amidst this development.

data.title: LinkedIn and AWS expert's Apex Career Bootcamp reaches $1M revenue, 1,000+ placements amid demand for AI-skilled workers.
data.description: In an announcement made on August 28, 2025, in San Francisco, The Apex Institute unveiled its strategy to address the potential displacement of millions of workers by artificial intelligence. The Institute has successfully developed a solution for workforce transformation by providing specialized training to technology professionals. These professionals are being equipped to fuel the growth of the future AI economy, focusing on expertise in cloud computing. Founded by [Founder's Name], The Apex Institute aims to prepare individuals for the changing job market, ensuring they have the skills necessary for success.
Extra price requirement satisfied and warrant expiration date confirmed in the latest update.

data.title: Petco's stock rises after beating Q2 earnings estimates. Earnings at 5 cents/share, revenue $1.48 billion. Woof is top performer.
data.description: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: WOOF) announced its Q4 results after the market closed on Thursday. The company posted earnings of $0.05 per share, surpassing expectations of a loss of $0.01 per share. However, revenue for the quarter was slightly lower than anticipated, coming in at $1.48 billion compared to the estimated $1.49 billion. WOOF has emerged as one of the top performers today. For further information, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 21Shares applies to release SEI ETF, competing with Canary Capital. SEI is the token for Sei network, supporting decentralized trading.
data.description: The SEI token is the official currency of the Sei network, a primary blockchain platform designed specifically for decentralized exchanges and online marketplaces.

data.title: Edgewater Wireless (TSXV:YFI) reported Fiscal Year 2025 financial results, with all figures in Canadian dollars.
data.description: Edgewater Wireless Systems Inc. (TSXV: YFI) (OTC: KPIFF) disclosed its audited financial results for the fiscal year ending April 30, 2025. The company, known for AI-powered Wi-Fi Spectrum Slicing™ technology, reported the figures in Canadian dollars following IFRS standards. FY2025 marked a year of establishing strong foundations for the company, with a corporate update provided. The news came from Ottawa, Ontario, and San Jose, California.

data.title: ONDO price down 1.36% to $0.93; RSI at 46.84 suggesting neutral momentum, MACD signaling bearish trend.
data.description: The price of ONDO has dropped 1.36% in the last 24 hours, currently trading at $0.93. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 46.84, indicating neutral momentum. Additionally, the Moving Average Converge Divergence (MACD) suggests bearish pressure in the near future.
